title: Oligosporus bargusinensis
taxonomy: Oligosporus bargusinensis is classified in the plant kingdom, specifically within the division Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. It belongs to the family Apocynaceae and the genus Oligosporus. Further classification places Oligosporus bargusinensis within the order Gentianales and the order Apocynales. The species is native to the Russian Far East and is a member of the woody plant family. Within its classification, it is considered an evergreen shrub or small tree.
